name: cybermem
description: A local memory substrate for cyber research system knowledge.

interface.shortDescription: Durable cyber research memory for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Cybermem stores reusable cyber research system knowledge as a local SQLite-backed graph. It keeps claims, relationships, and lightweight evidence references while leaving artifacts and transcripts on disk.
defaultPrompt: Search Cybermem before reviewing this asset.
Save durable security knowledge to Cybermem.
Export a Cybermem preseed for this workspace.
